channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rory McIlroy triumphs at Augusta by mastering the 12th hole
item.description: Rory McIlroy demonstrated remarkable composure at Augusta National during the final round of the 2026 Masters, particularly on the notoriously difficult 12th hole. Despite advice from golf legend Jack...

item.title: Three Senior Victorian Labor MPs to Retire Ahead of State Election
item.description: Three senior members of Premier Jacinta Allan's cabinet in Victoria have announced their decision to retire from politics, sparking a cabinet reshuffle just seven months before the state election. Thi...

item.title: Nova Scotia lobster industry faces challenges due to cold waters and rising fuel expenses
item.description: Nova Scotia’s lobster fishery, a cornerstone of the province’s economy and cultural heritage, is facing notable challenges this season. Cooler-than-usual ocean temperatures are impacting lobster activ...

item.title: Sonia Gandhi raises concerns over delimitation, says women’s reservation not the main issue
item.description: Congress Parliamentary Party chairperson Sonia Gandhi has expressed serious concerns regarding the Centre's proposed legislative measures, stressing that the main issue is delimitation, not women's re...

item.title: Pubs in England and Wales Granted Extended Opening Hours for World Cup Knockout Matches
item.description: The UK government has announced further adjustments to licensing regulations, allowing pubs in England and Wales to extend their opening hours for certain World Cup matches. This follows a previous re...

item.title: Manibela to stage three-day nationwide transport strike over high fuel prices
item.description: Transport group Manibela announced that it will hold a nationwide transport strike from April 15 to 17, 2026, to protest the government’s handling of rising fuel prices amid the ongoing conflict in th...

item.title: Raptors Clinch Playoff Spot with Barnes' Strong Performance
item.description: The Toronto Raptors secured their first playoff berth in four seasons on Sunday, defeating the Brooklyn Nets 136-101 in their regular-season finale. Star guard RJ Barrett led the scoring with 26 point...

item.title: How Climate Extremes Are Reshaping Lives Across Kenya's Dry and Flooded Lands
item.description: Across Kenya’s arid north and flood-prone south, communities are battling the growing toll of climate change. In counties such as Turkana, Wajir, Marsabit, Garissa, Mandera and Tana River, prolonged d...

item.title: Teen Rescued After Accident at Dangerous Sydney Blowhole
item.description: A dramatic rescue operation is currently underway in northern Sydney after a teenager was reportedly swept off rocks and sucked into a notorious blowhole. The incident took place at a well-known coast...

item.title: Pakistan and world leaders encourage continued ceasefire and renewed dialogue between US and Iran
item.description: As efforts to end hostilities in the Middle East stalled, Pakistan joined global powers on Sunday urging both the United States and Iran to continue respecting the temporary ceasefire and return to ne...

item.title: FG Urges Dangote Sugar Refinery to Scale Up Production to 600,000MT by 2030
item.description: The Minister of State for Industry, Senator John Owan Enoh, don visit Dangote Sugar Refinery (DSR) for Numan, Adamawa state, to yarn with them say make dem expand their annual sugar production capacit...

item.title: Hungary's Election Signals Shift Away from Populist Policies
item.description: Hungary's recent election has resulted in a significant shift in the country's political landscape, marking a potential departure from the long-standing populist policies of Viktor Orbán's government....

item.title: Kenya Ports Authority: Seven More Assets to be Listed for Private Investment
item.description: The National Treasury in Kenya is moving ahead with plans to involve private investors in the operation of key port infrastructure. This latest initiative involves seven additional facilities linked t...

item.title: BIGBANG performs their popular hits at Coachella festival
item.description: South Korean supergroup BIGBANG made a highly anticipated appearance at the Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival, delivering a performance that thrilled fans from around the world. The group's set...

item.title: How global uncertainty and a weaker rupee are shaping Indian students’ study‑abroad preferences
item.description: The news article discusses how ongoing geopolitical instability and the falling value of the Indian rupee are altering the study‑abroad preferences of Indian students. With the rupee depreciating shar...

item.title: Eric Swalwell Ends California Governor Campaign Amid Sexual Assault Allegations
item.description: Democratic Representative Eric Swalwell has suspended his campaign for governor of California following accusations of sexual assault, which he denies. The allegations, reported by the San Francisco C...

item.title: PTI highlights Pakistan's role in facilitating US-Iran dialogue despite unresolved issues
item.description: The PTI has expressed cautious optimism following the conclusion of US-Iran talks in Islamabad, despite no final agreement being reached. Sheikh Waqas Akram, PTI Central Information Secretary, stresse...

item.title: Edo State Government Highlights Achievements Across Infrastructure, Education, Healthcare, and Security After 18 Months
item.description: Edo State Government don yan say dem dey make progress for top sectors like road construction, healthcare, education and security within their 18 months for office. The Information Commissioner, Princ...

item.title: Discussion at New York Synagogue Sparks Controversy Over Support for Israeli Policies in Gaza
item.description: A recent event at New York’s Park Avenue Synagogue has generated significant controversy after Benjamin Anthony, an Israeli advocate, presented arguments supporting the forced displacement of Palestin...

item.title: Olivier Awards 2026: Highlights from Rachel Zegler, Brian Cranston and Paddington The Musical
item.description: The Olivier Awards 2026, held at the Royal Albert Hall, celebrated the best of British theatre with several standout moments. Rachel Zegler won Best Actress in a Musical for her role in Evita and paid...
